return(function(n,s,C,b,I,r,o,d,R,Y,P,q,O,K,U,F,x,g,E,t,w,k,S,H)x,E,k,Y,K,q,w,F,P,S,g,O,d,R,U,H,t=function(n,j)local s=q(j)local C=function(C,b,I,r,o,E,S)return U(n,{C,b,I,r;o;E;S},j,s)end return C
